title: James Cassidy quotes — afraid-to-be-silent + don't-be-normal (2022)
html:
James Cassidy quotes — afraid-to-be-silent + don't-be-normal (2022)

Source: 2022-12-16 Apple Note. Two-line capture from a James Cassidy talk/class — likely an OSU professor or guest speaker (TBD on identity).

TL;DR

  • Quote 1: "Don't be afraid to be wrong, be afraid to be silent." — explicit anti-silence maxim; same energy as later piercing prompts / "tell me what you really think" requests in 2025-2026 work.
  • Quote 2: "Not being a part of the normal world is how you succeed in life... If you are doing what everyone else is doing then you will not stand out." — classic outsider-thesis; same shape as 2022 01 frequency tribes thesis.
  • James Cassidy = identity TBD. Could be an OSU professor (the agronomy/soil-science prof at OSU is a public match); could be a podcast guest. Worth verifying.
  • Two quotes from one session = classic Yahir capture: he picks 2 lines from a longer talk, treats them as keepers.
  • Voice influence: both quotes show up restated in Yahir's own manifesto-style notes through 2024-2026.

Connections

  • james cassidy — stub-target if confirmed identity
  • osu
  • piercing prompts
  • 2022 01 07 failure is fitting in — same outsider-thesis lineage
